steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Prepare get response')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Prepare get response button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Reopen in builder')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Reopen in builder button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Report Builder Demo for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-panel')); const panel = panels.find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Forecast Trend Block')); return !!panel && panel.querySelectorAll('.forge-chart-legend-action').length >= 1; })()

(() => { const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-panel')); const panel = panels.find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Forecast Trend Block')); if (!panel) { throw new Error('Forecast Trend Block runtime panel not found.'); } const action = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.forge-chart-legend-action')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Display')) || panel.querySelector('.forge-chart-legend-action'); if (!action) { throw new Error('Forecast Trend Block legend action not found.'); } action.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const panel = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-panel')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Forecast Trend Block')); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Selected value:') && text.includes('Display') && text.includes('Show channel details'); })()

(() => { const panel = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-panel')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Forecast Trend Block')); if (!panel) { throw new Error('Forecast Trend Block runtime panel not found.'); } const action = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-chart-action')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Show channel details')); if (!action) { throw new Error('Forecast Trend Block detail action not found.'); } action.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const panel = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-host-intent'); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('target://steward/performance/channel-detail') && text.includes('channel') && text.includes('Display'); })()
